questions: named entity recognition kivabe kaam kore?
NER er use case ki ki?
NER diye ki ki detect kora jay?
answers: Named Entity Recognition (NER) is an NLP task that identifies and classifies named entities in text — like person names, organizations, locations, dates, and monetary values.
NER holo text theke important entities detect kora — jemon name, place, date, organization. 'Elon Musk lives in Texas' theke NER detect kore: Elon Musk (Person), Texas (Location).
NER is used in information extraction, search engines, chatbots, and document processing. Tools like spaCy, Hugging Face transformers, and Stanford NER make it easy to implement.

Named entity recognition helps machines understand who, what, where, and when in text. It's essential for building knowledge graphs, automating data extraction, and powering intelligent search systems.
